content: Analyze AAPL revenue, margins, valuation risks, and the key catalysts to watch.

args.query: Apple (AAPL) revenue trend, gross margin, operating margin, net margin, FCF and margins; valuation metrics (P/E, forward P/E, EV/EBITDA, P/S), analyst estimates and price targets; identify key valuation risks and what catalysts are driving recent results/expectations.

data.get_key_ratios_AAPL:

- P/E: — | EPS: —
- Revenue Growth: — | Earnings Growth: —
- Gross Margin: 47.2% | Op Margin: 33.0% | Net Margin: 27.7%
- D/E: 1.16

args.query: AAPL current price, valuation multiples (P/E trailing and forward if available, EV/EBITDA, P/S), and the latest news/headlines + guidance/catalysts (services growth, iPhone demand, China, buybacks) relevant to revenue and margins; also check recent insider selling/buying if available.
